kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC09_Detailed news item view

kw.name: Given the user sees a short description of a news item
Click Element
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b80245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b802b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ed5b6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9938093] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b996fe72] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b996a0d1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9969383] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98b60b5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e958f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e8fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9eb30b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b9d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9ba600c+3a49c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98b4e4a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9ff20c8+486558] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa4c3be8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa4d38c48c+2c]

InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b80245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b802b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ed7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98d8842] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ff0b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99770b0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99940e2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e958f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e8fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9eb30b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b9d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9ba600c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b89634+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b897e6+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b6e2f7+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa4c3be8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa4d38c48c+2c]
kw.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b80245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b802b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ed7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98d8842] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ff0b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99770b0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99940e2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e958f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e8fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9eb30b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b9d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9ba600c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b89634+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b897e6+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b6e2f7+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa4c3be8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa4d38c48c+2c]

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b80245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b802b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ed7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98d8842] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ff0b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99770b0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99940e2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e958f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e8fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9eb30b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b9d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9ba600c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b89634+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b897e6+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b6e2f7+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa4c3be8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa4d38c48c+2c]

kw.name: When the user clicks on the news item
Then the user should see a detailed view appear in a modal

test.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b80245+146d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b802b0+14740] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ed7cd] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98d8842] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b98ff0b1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99770b0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b99940e2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939018] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff6b9939f03] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e958f9+329d89] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9e8fe46+3242d6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9eb30b2+347542] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b9d3d5+31865] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9ba600c+3a49c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b89634+1dac4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b897e6+1dc76] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6b9b6e2f7+2787] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa4c3be8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa4d38c48c+2c]
